body.title: D328: Repo reorganization — wild_igor/ + lab/ + papers/
body.result: D328 implemented: lab/ (design_docs, claudecode, benchmarks, deploy, tools, audit_reports, hosted_igor, docs), papers/ (history, thoughts, case_study). Deleted stale: install_igor.ps1, start_igor_windows.ps1, sign_igor_script.ps1. All path refs updated: CLAUDE.md, .mcp.json, settings, skills, tests. 1961 tests pass.
body.description:
Implement D328 repo reorg. Current state: 15 top-level dirs + 16 root files, many misplaced.

Target structure:
  wild_igor/          — runtime code (stays)
  tests/              — tests (stays)
  lab/                — design_docs, design_docs_for_igor, claudecode, benchmarks, deploy, tools, audit_reports
  papers/             — history, thoughts, case_study
  Root keeps:         CLAUDE.md, README.md, requirements.txt, igor.ps1, igor.bat, install_igor.ps1, docker-compose.yml, superclaude.bat, sign_igor_script.ps1, start_igor_windows.ps1, sudo_relay.sh

Moves:
  design_docs/ → lab/design_docs/
  design_docs_for_igor/ → lab/design_docs_for_igor/
  claudecode/ → lab/claudecode/
  benchmarks/ → lab/benchmarks/
  deploy/ → lab/deploy/
  tools/ → lab/tools/
  audit_reports/ → lab/audit_reports/
  history/ → papers/history/
  thoughts/ → papers/thoughts/
  docs/glossary.md → lab/docs/glossary.md
  memory/sessions.md → lab/docs/sessions.md
  hosted_igor/ → lab/hosted_igor/

Delete from root:
  5624.log (stale git log)
  case_study_statistics_2026-04-01.md → papers/
  ebook_candidates.md → lab/
  STARTUP_SHIM.md → lab/docs/
  SYSTEM_PACKAGES.md → lab/docs/

Update all path refs in: CLAUDE.md, skills, cc_queue.py, session_manager.py, decision_manager.py, cron scripts, .claude/settings.json, seed scripts.

Instance output: ~/.TheIgors/lab/ for audit_reports, training output.
